36: In the context of LangGraph, this principle is applied to the graph's topology. Parallel
37: workflows are defined by architecting the graph such that multiple nodes, lacking
38: direct sequential dependencies, can be initiated from a single common node. These
39: parallel pathways execute independently before their results can be aggregated at a
40: subsequent convergence point in the graph.
